name: Strandline Resources Ltd
description: Strandline Resources Limited (ASX: STA) is an emerging critical minerals mining company focused on the development of high-quality mineral sands projects. The company is primarily known for advancing its 100% owned, world-scale Coburn Mineral Sands Project located in Western Australia. Strandline's portfolio includes a range of development assets aimed at producing essential minerals such as zircon, rutile, ilmenite, and leucoxene. By leveraging its strategic assets in Australia and its historical exploration interests in East Africa, the company aims to become a significant global supplier of critical minerals to meet growing industrial demand.
